summary: All four requirements are implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is covered by the new ErrorBoundary component and its usage in App.tsx. REQ-2 is covered by the AppContent component in App.tsx that checks isInitializing and shows a spinner. REQ-3 is covered by LandingPage.tsx with try/catch, toast on error, loading state on button, and redirect for authenticated users. REQ-4 is covered by useQueries.ts returning EMPTY_VAULT when actor is null and using enabled: !!actor guards. No hallucinated features were detected.
